name: phpunit
description: The PHPUnit is a command-line test runner that can be invoked through the phpunit command

options.name: --coverage-clover
options.description: Generate code coverage report in Clover XML format,

options.name: --coverage-crap4j
options.description: Generate code coverage report in Crap4J XML format

options.name: --coverage-html
options.description: Generate code coverage report in HTML format

options.name: --coverage-php
options.description: Export PHP_CodeCoverage object to file

options.name: --coverage-text
options.description: Generate code coverage report in text format [default: standard output]

options.name: --coverage-xml
options.description: Generate code coverage report in PHPUnit XML format

options.name: --coverage-cache
options.description: Cache static analysis results

options.name: --warm-coverage-cache
options.description: Warm static analysis cache

options.name: --coverage-filter
options.description: Include <dir> in code coverage analysis

options.name: --path-coverage
options.description: Perform path coverage analysis

options.name: --disable-coverage-ignore
options.description: Disable annotations for ignoring code coverage

options.name: --no-coverage
options.description: Ignore code coverage configuration

options.name: --dont-report-useless-tests
options.description: Do not report tests that do not test anything

options.name: --strict-coverage
options.description: Be strict about @covers annotation usage

options.name: --strict-global-state
options.description: Be strict about changes to global state

options.name: --disallow-test-output
options.description: Be strict about output during tests

options.name: --disallow-resource-usage
options.description: Be strict about resource usage during small tests

options.name: --enforce-time-limit
options.description: Enforce time limit based on test size

options.name: --default-time-limit
options.description: Timeout in seconds for tests without @small, @medium or @large

options.name: --disallow-todo-tests
options.description: Disallow @todo-annotated tests

options.name: --log-junit
options.description: Log test execution in JUnit XML format to file

options.name: --log-teamcity
options.description: Log test execution in TeamCity format to file

options.name: --testdox-html
options.description: Write agile documentation in HTML format to file

options.name: --testdox-text
options.description: Write agile documentation in Text format to file

options.name: --testdox-xml
options.description: Write agile documentation in HTML format to file

options.name: --reverse-list
options.description: Print defects in reverse order

options.name: --no-logging
options.description: Ignore logging configuration

options.name: --prepend
options.description: A PHP script that is included as early as possible

options.name: --bootstrap
options.description: A PHP script that is included before the tests run

name: -c
--configuration
options.description: Read configuration from XML file

options.name: --no-configuration
options.description: Ignore default configuration file (phpunit.xml)

options.name: --extensions
options.description: A comma separated list of PHPUnit extensions to load

options.name: --no-extensions
options.description: Do not load PHPUnit extensions

options.name: --include-path
options.description: Prepend PHP's include_path with given path(s)

options.name: -d
options.description: Sets a php.ini value

options.name: --cache-result-file
options.description: Specify result cache path and filename

options.name: --generate-configuration
options.description: Generate configuration file with suggested settings

options.name: --migrate-configuration
options.description: Migrate configuration file to current format
